pages.title: AI Video Localization Pipeline
pages.kicker: Same video, new language, familiar speaker identity

cards.title: Segment the source
cards.body: Chinese tutorial audio becomes timed text segments with speaker boundaries.

cards.title: Translate with context
cards.body: Technical vocabulary gets reviewed before synthesis so GitHub terms survive.

cards.title: Rebuild the audio
cards.body: Voice cloning, timing, loudness, and FFmpeg turn segments back into a watchable video.

pages.title: AI Video Localization Pipeline
pages.kicker: The negative result pointed to data, script, and pronunciation

cards.title: New characters worked
cards.body: The vocabulary extension and embedding resize path loaded correctly into F5-TTS.

cards.title: Pronunciation did not
cards.body: Unvocalized Darija text left too much missing vowel and loanword information.

cards.title: Next layer: G2P
cards.body: A Darija grapheme-to-phoneme layer is likely needed before robust synthesis.

pages.title: Localization Has Four Quality Axes
pages.kicker: A localized video succeeds only when meaning, voice, timing, and local language all survive.

cards.title: Meaning
cards.body: Translation must preserve intent, names, terminology, and implied relationships.

cards.title: Voice identity
cards.body: Cloned speech should remain stable without obscuring consent or provenance.

cards.title: Timing
cards.body: Generated speech must fit cuts, pauses, subtitles, and visible mouth movement.

cards.title: Local review
cards.body: Native reviewers catch register, dialect, and cultural errors missed by metrics.
